description: Advances: specled.config — empirical audit proved SpecLedEx.Config records a config_warning diagnostic when it drops an invalid severity value (e.g. YAML ':off'), but config.diagnostics is read only by tests: neither spec.validate nor spec.check prints it, so a broken override fails 100% silently. This amplifier turned a doc typo class into an invisible failure. Emit config diagnostics as findings (or stderr warnings) in both tasks. Evidence: vault .../20260722-203631-empirical.md section 1.
title: Surface config diagnostics in spec.validate and spec.check output
